rule_hits.summary: Lists references related to the research on music-to-dance generation, image-to-video generation, and related techniques used in the paper.
Discusses the limitations of current joint sequence-based methods for music-to-dance generation and introduces DabFusion, which generates dance videos from still images and musi...
Reviews existing methods for music-to-dance generation and image-to-video generation, emphasizing the novelty of using music as a conditioning factor in image-to-video synthesis.
